content:
Omarchy has a built-in way to set simple reminders based on a countdown timer and with a message. You can do this via Super + Ctrl + R, seeing all the ones set via Super + Ctrl + Alt + R, and clearing all via Super + Ctrl + Shift + R. Everything also accessible via Trigger > Reminder. You can also use the cli with omarchy reminder 7 'Tea ready'.

Super + Ctrl + Alt + R

Super + Ctrl + Shift + R

omarchy reminder 7 'Tea ready'
